final:
module audio_mixer(  
    input clk,  
    input [7:0] audio1,  
    input [7:0] audio2,  
    output reg [7:0] mixed_audio  
);  
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin  
        mixed_audio <= (audio1 + audio2 > 255) ? 8'd255 : audio1 + audio2;  
    end  
endmodule
